eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Chelan, WA; at 7:27 AM on JUL 23, 2026 Effective until 9:27 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Chelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 3 Evacuation Order in Trinity north of Lake Wenatchee. The affected area is All of the Trinity area to Atkinson flats also known as Forest Service Road 6200. Leave now.  Roads and evacuation routes can get blocked. If you don't leave now, you may be trapped, injured, or killed. CHECK Local media or the Chelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book. 
Repeat.
Chelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 3 Evacuation Order in Trinity north of Lake Wenatchee. The affected area is All of the Trinity area to Atkinson flats also known as Forest Service Road 6200. Leave now. Roads and  evacuation routes can get blocked. If you don't leave now, you may be trapped, injured, or killed. CHECK Local media or the Chelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book. You will be kept advised as conditions change.  Please monitor local radio stations and Shelan County Emergency Management Face book for updates.
